UnbindHaVipInstance.haVipId: The ID of the HA VIP (High Availability Virtual IP)
UnbindHaVipInstance.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of no more than 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency Support](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
UnbindHaVipInstance.instanceIds: List of instance IDs to unbind, with a maximum of 5 entries
UnbindHaVipInstance.instanceType: Type of instance to unbind: "SERVER" for cloud servers (BCC/BBC/DCC), "ENI" for Elastic Network Interface
